title: Tensura: Cataclysm Loot
description: Adds Tensura: Reincarnated items to L_Ender 's Cataclysm mobs loot tables.
body:
This datapack adds [Tensura: Reincarnated](https://modrinth.com/mod/tensura-reincarnated) mod items to [L_Ender 's Cataclysm](https://modrinth.com/mod/l_enders-cataclysm) mobs loot tables. Mainly elemental essence, elemental shards, element cores, magic ores, and other items.

I recommend using this datapack with the [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) mod and the [JER](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-enough-resources-jer) mod to see the lootdrops and their chances.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Lootdrop chance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93d454360c9849f4429c5ef1bcc08fe62be24f0b.png)


</details>



Feel free to leave feedback or suggest changes if the lootdrops seems unbalanced or being different with the list below.


Checkout my other datapack:

- [Tensura Bosses-NEB Spawn Egg](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tensura-bosses-neb-spawn-egg)

---
## Loot Tables
### **The End**
- ### **Ruined Citadel (Space Element)**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Ender Guardian**
  - Space Elemental Shards: 3-5
  - Space Element Core: 1-3
  - Magic Ore Shards: 4-6 (50%)
  - Elemental Essence: 1-2

**Ender Golem**
  - Space Elemental Shards: 3-5
  - Space Element Core: 1-3
  - Magic Ore Shards: 4-6 (50%)

**Endermaptera**
  - Space Elemental Shards: 1 (40%)
  - Magic Ore Shards: 1-2 (10%)

</details>

---

### **Nether**

<details>

**Ignis**

  - Fire Element Core: 1-3
  - Magic Ore Shards: 4-6 (50%)
  - Elemental Essence: 1-2

**Netherite Monstrosity**
  - Fire Elemental Shards: 3-5
  - Fire Element Core: 1-3
  - Magic Ore Shards: 4-6 (50%)
  - Elemental Essence: 1-2

**Ignited Revenant**
  - Fire Elemental Shards: 1-2 (50%)
  - Magic Ore Shards: 2-3 (25%)

**Ignited Berserker**
  - Fire Elemental Shards: 1-2 (50%)
  - Magic Ore Shards: 2-3 (25%)

</details>
